text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Fan Fest, where Umamusume show
their appreciation to the fans who support them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special events are being held all over Tracen
Academy for the occasion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The training track seems to be a particularly
popular spot, so I go to see what's happening.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Did you come to watch me get jiggy?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, well, the truth is...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hmm... What am I going to do?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: What's wrong? You look worried.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Well, there's a small problem with the Fan Fest...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We have a sudden opening in the schedule for the
training track.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You don't have enough people?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's right. We prepared some races, but due to
how busy everyone is, we couldn't get enough
students to participate.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey! If that's the case, I have an idea!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I came up with a plan for fans to
join in, so we can all have fun together!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The track is normally closed to visitors, but I'll
open it up and let everyone in!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Then, in the middle of the track, the younger
students and I will hold a performance! How rad is
that?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I took a page from those musicals that are super
trendy right now!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you don't know? You're so out of touch!
Don't be left behind by the times!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's going to knock everyone's socks off, so come
check it out!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky! The stage is set!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: The f-fluffy folding fans are ready too...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's get this show on the road!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Tracen! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky and the others on stage begin to
energetically dance to techno beats.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Get down, everybody! Wooooo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nearby fans murmur amongst themselves as they
gather around...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: This brings me back... I miss those days...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I used to dance like crazy to music like this back
in the day...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What? Why's everyone acting like this is some
kind of throwback party?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text: Thank you for reminding me of the good ol' days!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Y-you're welcome...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, let's get into the groove, everybody!
This music is, uh, funky fresh, right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While not the vibe that Maruzensky was hoping
for, the performance still ends up going over well
with a lot of people.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: This is what Maruzensky is all about!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Just what we hoped for! Loving the nostalgia! So
groovy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wow! Everyone looks so happy!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'd better do my part and wave this fluffy fan...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wahhh! Look at everyone having such a great
time... It's gonna make me cryyy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I dunno what's going on, but you really know your
stuff, Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You don't know? All the young ladies today love
go-go dancing!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's pump it up! Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, it seems that leaving it up to Maruzensky
was the right decision.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Especially those fluffy folding fans! They do add a certain fan-ciful flair... Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Maruzensky's performance ends in
roaring success.
